message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.pad passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-ij2b)

Expose fnp_python.pad delegating to numpy.pad(array, pad_width, mode='constant', **kwargs).
Extra mode-specific kwargs forward verbatim so the full numpy surface is exposed.
Parity oracle test covers:
- default mode='constant' with scalar pad_width
- asymmetric tuple pad_width (before, after)
- constant_values kwarg
- edge, reflect, symmetric, wrap modes
- 2-D array with per-axis pad widths [(1,2), (3,0)]
- linear_ramp with explicit end_values
- maximum / mean / minimum stat modes
